01-the-ai-product-mindset.instruction: Name 3 differences between traditional software and AI products. For each, the implication for development.
01-the-ai-product-mindset.successMessage: Understanding these differences separates AI builders from feature factories.

02-finding-ai-product-ideas.instruction: Generate 3 AI product ideas: painful manual process + AI capability = product. Score each on pain, feasibility, market.
02-finding-ai-product-ideas.successMessage: Pain + AI = Product. Simple formula, powerful results.

03-validation-and-prototyping.instruction: Write a prompt for landing page copy to test demand before building. Include headline, value prop, features, CTA.
03-validation-and-prototyping.successMessage: Validate before you build. Could save months.

04-architecture-decisions.instruction: Building an AI writing assistant. Make 5 architecture decisions: model, hosting, database, auth, pricing. Justify each.
04-architecture-decisions.successMessage: Early architecture decisions save 10x the cost of changing later.

05-building-the-mvp.instruction: Define MVP scope: ONE core feature, 3 things NOT in v1, the metric that proves it works.
05-building-the-mvp.successMessage: Saying 'not in v1' is the hardest and most important product skill.

06-user-experience-for-ai.instruction: Design UX for an AI feature with 5-10 second response time. 3 patterns to keep users engaged during the wait.
06-user-experience-for-ai.successMessage: Your patterns solve the 'dead air' problem.

07-pricing-and-monetization.instruction: Design 3 pricing tiers for your AI product. Each: name, price, features, usage limits, target customer.
07-pricing-and-monetization.successMessage: Pricing tiers create a clear upgrade path.

08-launch-and-distribution.instruction: Launch plan: 5 distribution channels ranked by ROI, launch day checklist, first-week success metrics.
08-launch-and-distribution.successMessage: A launch plan turns 'ship and pray' into repeatable strategy.

09-measuring-and-iterating.instruction: 5 post-launch metrics. Each: what it measures, how to track, threshold for 'good' vs 'concerning'.
09-measuring-and-iterating.successMessage: These are your product's vital signs.

10-scaling-your-ai-product.instruction: 1,000 users, costs climbing. Scaling plan: cost optimization, infrastructure, team growth.
10-scaling-your-ai-product.successMessage: Product meets engineering meets business. All three covered.
